title: Working Like a Lawyer with Claude
summary: Mark Pike from Anthropic and Anna Gressel from Freshfields discuss how lawyers use Claude in their work. They explore how legal practice is changing with AI integration while emphasizing that final judgment remains with the human lawyer.
writeup: Mark Pike of Anthropic and Anna Gressel of Freshfields discuss how lawyers integrate Claude into legal work and how that integration is changing legal practice. The conversation centers on a human-in-the-loop model: AI assists, and final judgment stays with the human lawyer. The takeaway is that legal AI shifts parts of the workflow without removing professional accountability.
